title: Shulker Doubler V2
description: Featuring a datapack that allows you to get a duplicate of a shulkerbox (This is NOT A CHEAT, IT IS A DATAPACK)
body:
**Disclaimer: This is a Minecraft datapack, and does not serve as any cheat. It is just an extension to spice up your world.**

This datapacks works simple. For those who want an interesting way of ruining your fun, or maybe to spice up your world, you can now get a duplicate of a shulker box. It works with any shulker box dye, and in order to get a duplicate you must **shift while breaking for it to drop 2.** 

It does work in singleplayer worlds and in multiplayer, but the world in the server itself must have the datapack for it to function.

This datapack is only meant for 1.20 to latest. If you want older theres one created by NealSky on PlanetMinecraft.
